analysis_method: Forensic pixel-level reverse-engineering from master screenshot + 6 interface examples

global_canvas.background: Warm off-white #FAFAF8 matte surface with extremely subtle warm noise texture (grain at ~2% opacity). Not pure white — there is a cream/parchment warmth. Edges of the viewport show a very faint warm radial gradient darkening to approximately #F0EDE6 in the corners, creating a vignette effect that pushes focus inward.
global_canvas.ambient_light: Top-left directional soft light source at approximately 315 degrees (northwest). This is visible in how card shadows fall slightly down-right, and how the sidebar has a slightly warmer illumination on its left edge. The lighting model mimics a diffused overhead panel light in a premium showroom — no harsh highlights, just gentle luminosity variation across surfaces.
global_canvas.depth_model: Hybrid soft-neumorphism. NOT classic neumorphism (no embossed/debossed extremes). Instead: cards float 2-4px above the base surface using soft directional shadows. The sidebar sits at the lowest elevation (flush). Cards sit at elevation-1 (2px shadow). The hero visualization panel sits at elevation-2 (4-8px shadow). Modals sit at elevation-3 (16px shadow). Depth is created through shadow opacity gradients, NOT through border thickness or color changes.

panel_system.outer_border: 1px solid #E5E5E0 — barely visible warm gray. On cards adjacent to the golden visualization, the border picks up a faint yellow reflection: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.08). Corner radius: 12px for main content panels, 8px for cards within panels. NO border glow on standard panels.
panel_system.inner_shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) — a 1px white highlight on the top inner edge of every card, simulating a beveled top edge catching the overhead light. This is extremely subtle but present on every raised surface.
panel_system.outer_shadow: Standard card: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03). Elevated panel: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07), 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04). Hero panel: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04).
panel_system.surface_material: Matte white (#FFFFFF) for card surfaces. Not glossy — no specular highlights. The material reads as high-quality matte paper or premium plastic (think Apple product box surface). There is an implied micro-texture at 1-2% opacity that prevents surfaces from looking digitally flat.
panel_system.corner_radius: Cards: 12px. KPI cards: 12px. Buttons: 8px (standard), 9999px (capsule/pill). Input fields: 8px. Sidebar nav items: 8px. Main content area: 16px outer container. Table cells: 0px (sharp). Tags/badges: 6px.
panel_system.padding: Cards: 20px all sides. KPI cards: 20px. Section containers: 24px. Sidebar: 16px horizontal, 8px between items. Table cells: 12px 16px. The hero banner: 32px.
panel_system.border_glow: Only on active/selected states and the hero visualization container. Active nav item: box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15), 0 0 8px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.06). Hero panel border: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.08) bleeding outward.

sidebar.background: Warm cream gradient — top: #F5F0E8, bottom: #F0EBE0. Slightly warmer than the main canvas. In the master image, the lower portion of the sidebar shows a golden/amber warm glow bleeding from the hero visualization (approximately rgba(255, 210, 50, 0.06) radial gradient centered at the hero sphere position). The sidebar surface reads as parchment-warm, distinct from the cooler white of content cards.
sidebar.border: Right edge: 1px solid #E5E5E0. No top/bottom/left border — it bleeds to the viewport edge. The border is structural, not decorative.
sidebar.width: 240px expanded. 64px collapsed (icon-only mode visible in IMG_2535).
sidebar.section_labels: font-family: Inter; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #9A9A9A; margin-bottom: 12px; margin-top: 24px; padding-left: 12px. Reads as: 'CORE', 'INTELLIGENCE', 'AUTOMATION', 'ANALYTICS'.
sidebar.nav_items: font-family: Inter; font-size: 13px (0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; color: #6B6B6B; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px. Icon: 20px, stroke-weight 1.5-2, color matching text. Hover state: background: #F0F0EB; color: #1A1A1A; transition: 200ms ease.
sidebar.nav_items_active: background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.10); color: #1A1A1A; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.20); border-radius: 8px. Icon color shifts to #C8A200 (darkened gold). A subtle left accent might appear as border-left: 3px solid #FFD700 on some variants. The active item has a micro box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.08).
sidebar.nav_item_spacing: gap: 2px between items within a section. Sections separated by 24px (including the section label height).
sidebar.logo_area: Top-left. Logo icon: a circle with an inner ring, rendered in #FFD700 gold, approximately 28-32px diameter. Text: 'OCULOPS' or 'OculOps' in Inter, font-weight: 700, font-size: 18px, color: #1A1A1A, letter-spacing: -0.01em. Below logo in some variants: a subtitle badge 'AI Intelligence OS Signal' in a small rounded chip with background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.10), font-size: 11px.
sidebar.footer: Bottom of sidebar. User email: 'dev@oculops.os' in font-size: 12px, color: #6B6B6B. Version: 'v1.0.0' in font-size: 10px, color: #9A9A9A. A settings/logout icon button to the right. Separated from nav by border-top: 1px solid #E5E5E0. Padding: 16px.

hero_visualization.description: A massive golden energy sphere with neural network tendrils, resembling a TouchDesigner-inspired reactive data visualization. The sphere dominates the upper-right quadrant of the main content area, approximately 400x400px in visual footprint. It depicts a luminous golden orb with white-hot core radiating energy filaments.
hero_visualization.style: TouchDesigner generative art / data sculpture. Not a flat illustration — it reads as a 3D volumetric render with depth-of-field blur on the extremities. The tendrils are organic, branching, electrical — like neural dendrites or lightning captured in amber. The sphere has internal luminosity gradients: white core (#FFFFFF) fading through bright gold (#FFD700) to amber (#CC9900) at the edges.
hero_visualization.colors: Core: #FFFFFF pure white emission. Inner ring: #FFE44D bright yellow. Mid body: #FFD700 standard gold. Outer tendrils: #CC9900 darker gold to #997700 at tips. Particle scatter: tiny #FFD700 dots at 20-60% opacity floating around the sphere. Background glow: radial gradient from rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15) at center to transparent at 300px radius.
hero_visualization.container: The sphere sits within the main content hero panel, which is a large card (approximately 60% of content width, 350-400px tall) with 12px border-radius, 1px solid #E5E5E0 border. The sphere bleeds slightly beyond the card boundaries via overflow: visible, creating a layered depth effect. The card background is white with the golden glow bleeding onto it.
hero_visualization.grid_overlay: Behind the sphere: a subtle geometric wireframe grid rendered at approximately 5-8% opacity in #9A9A9A. The grid is perspective-corrected (vanishing point behind the sphere), creating depth. Grid lines are 1px, spaced approximately 40-60px apart. Some grid intersections have small dot markers.
hero_visualization.data_points: Scattered around the sphere: floating numeric labels like coordinate pairs, percentages, or data values. Font: JetBrains Mono, 9-10px, color: #9A9A9A at 50-70% opacity. Positioned seemingly randomly but following the energy tendril paths. These create a 'live data processing' feeling.

kpi_cards.shape: Rounded rectangle, border-radius: 12px. Aspect ratio approximately 1.4:1 (wider than tall). Standard size approximately 200px wide x 140px tall in a 4-column grid.
kpi_cards.border: 1px solid #E5E5E0. On the MRR card (first card), the border has a subtle yellow tint: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.25). This signals 'primary KPI'.
kpi_cards.label_style: font-family: Inter; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #6B6B6B. Positioned below the value. Examples: 'MRR', 'CLIENTS', 'PIPELINE', 'ALERTS', 'COMPLETED', 'SIGNALS'.
kpi_cards.value_style: font-family: Inter (NOT mono for these); font-size: 32px (2rem); font-weight: 700; color: #1A1A1A; line-height: 1.1. The value is the dominant element. For percentages: '98.4%'. For currency: '€0'. For counts: '15'. The value sits vertically centered with generous whitespace.
kpi_cards.icon_style: Top-left corner of each card. 32x32px container with border-radius: 8px. Background: the icon's semantic color at 10% opacity. Icon itself: 20px, matching semantic color. Examples: yellow bell for alerts, green checkmark for completed, blue signal icon for signals. The icon container has: padding: 6px, background: rgba(color, 0.10).
kpi_cards.progress_bar: Below the label, a target line: font-size: 11px, color: #9A9A9A, e.g. 'Target: €20k'. No visible progress bar fill in the standard state — the target is text-only. The health score widget uses a circular progress ring instead (see health_score_widget).

health_score_widget.ring_color_fill: Gradient from #FFD700 to #FFC400, rendered as stroke-dasharray animation
health_score_widget.center_value: font-family: Inter; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: #1A1A1A. The number sits perfectly centered.
health_score_widget.label_below: 'HEALTH SCORE' in font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #6B6B6B; text-align: center; margin-top: 8px.

data_table.header_row: background: #FAFAF8 (matching page bg, not card white). font-family: Inter; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #6B6B6B. Padding: 12px 16px. Border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5E0. No border-top on first header.
data_table.data_rows: background: #FFFFFF. font-family: Inter; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: #1A1A1A. Padding: 12px 16px. Height: 48px. Border-bottom: 1px solid #F0F0EB (very subtle separator, lighter than header border).
data_table.alternating: No zebra striping. All rows are white. Hover: background transitions to rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.04) — an almost imperceptible warm gold highlight.
data_table.borders: Outer container: 1px solid #E5E5E0, border-radius: 12px, overflow: hidden. Internal cell borders: none (no vertical dividers). Only horizontal separators between rows.
data_table.typography: Data cells: Inter 13px regular #1A1A1A. Numeric data: Inter 13px medium #1A1A1A (slightly bolder for scanability). Dates/timestamps: Inter 12px regular #6B6B6B.
data_table.status_indicators: Colored dot + text label. Pattern: 8px circle (filled) + 4px gap + text. Colors: green #34C759 for 'Online'/'Active', yellow #FFD700 for 'Processing'/'Warning', red #E53E3E for 'Error'/'Critical'. The dot may have a subtle box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(color, 0.4) for live feeling.
data_table.signal_bars: In the master image, the 'Signal Strength' column contains miniature horizontal bar charts. Each bar: height 4px, border-radius: 2px. Fill color: #FFD700 gold. Background track: #E5E5E0. Width proportional to signal value, max ~80px. These bars are THE signature data visualization element in tables.
data_table.highlight_column: The 'Signal Strength' column header in the master image has a distinct yellow background: background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15); border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px. This highlights it as the key intelligence metric column. Text remains the standard header style but may shift to #C8A200 gold.

yellow_usage.fills: Active sidebar nav item background (10% opacity). KPI accent card border (25% opacity). Hero sphere visualization (100% opacity). Health score ring (100% fill). Signal strength bars in tables (100% fill). CTA buttons: solid #FFD700 background with #1A1A1A text. Tag/badge background for 'OPPORTUNITY' type (15% opacity).
yellow_usage.borders: Active nav item: 1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.20). Primary KPI card: 1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.25). Cortex agent card: 1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.30). Focus ring on inputs: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,215,0,0.20).
yellow_usage.text: Never use #FFD700 for body text (too light). Accent text uses darkened gold: #C8A200 or #997700. Section emphasis labels. Active nav item icon color.
yellow_usage.glows: Hero visualization: 0 0 24px rgba(255,215,0,0.12). Active elements: 0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,0.06). The golden sphere casts a warm ambient glow onto nearby surfaces.
yellow_usage.distribution: Yellow must not exceed 5% of total visual surface area. It is a SIGNAL color — used to draw attention, not to decorate.

color_relationships.white_usage: Pure #FFFFFF: card surfaces, input field backgrounds, modal panels. Off-white #FAFAF8: page background canvas. #F5F5F0: secondary inset surfaces, table header backgrounds. White dominates 70%+ of visual area.

gray_spectrum.usage: Inset areas, input backgrounds, subtle separators
Standard borders, dividers, progress bar tracks
Primary text, headlines, values — the only 'black'

color_relationships.accent_rules: Green #34C759 only for success/online states. Red #E53E3E only for errors/danger. Orange #FF9F43 only for warnings. Blue #3B82F6 only for informational/links. These semantic colors appear ONLY in status dots, badges, and trend indicators — never in backgrounds, borders, or large surfaces. Yellow #FFD700 is the SOLE brand accent.

kpi_value.note: Some variants use JetBrains Mono for numeric-heavy KPIs

cortex_master_card.background: Linear gradient from rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.06) top-left to rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.02) bottom-right, layered on #FFFFFF
cortex_master_card.title: Inter 24px bold #1A1A1A, 'CORTEX'
cortex_master_card.subtitle: Inter 13px regular #6B6B6B, 'Head Orchestrator'
cortex_master_card.live_badge: Green #34C759 dot 8px + 'Online' or 'LIVE' text in 11px semibold, green pill badge background rgba(52,199,89,0.10)
cortex_master_card.metrics_row: Three metric blocks side by side: label 11px #6B6B6B, value 20px bold #1A1A1A. Separated by 1px vertical dividers in #E5E5E0.
cortex_master_card.action_buttons: Capsule buttons: border: 1px solid #E5E5E0, border-radius: 8px, padding: 8px 16px, font: 13px medium. Icon prefix 16px. Hover: border-color: #D4D4CF, shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06).

sub_agent_card.header: Agent name: Inter 18px bold #1A1A1A. Online badge: green dot + 'Online' pill. Positioned top-right.
sub_agent_card.capability_tags: Pill badges: background: #F0F0EB, border: 1px solid #E5E5E0, border-radius: 6px, padding: 3px 10px, font: 11px medium #6B6B6B. Horizontal row with 6px gap.
sub_agent_card.body_text: Inter 13px regular #6B6B6B. 2-3 lines describing current intelligence task.
sub_agent_card.confidence_badges: Two inline pills: type badge (OPPORTUNITY/RISK) in yellow/red bg + severity badge (HIGH/MEDIUM) in matching color + percentage text '85% CONFIDENT'.
sub_agent_card.footer: 'OPERATIONAL LOGIC' label in 11px semibold #9A9A9A, with right arrow icon. Click target for detail expansion.

live_badge.dot: 8px circle #34C759 with box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(52,199,89,0.5) — pulsing animation

neumorphic_treatment.variant: Soft neumorphism — subtle, not extreme. Closer to Apple's visionOS card depth than classic neumorphism.
neumorphic_treatment.light_source: Top-left (315 degrees / northwest). Consistent across all elements.
neumorphic_treatment.raised_elements: Cards, KPI tiles, buttons, the sidebar logo icon, the health score ring container. These have a bright top-left edge and a dark bottom-right shadow.
neumorphic_treatment.inset_elements: Search input field, progress bar tracks, toggle switch tracks, slider tracks. These read as recessed into the surface.
neumorphic_treatment.shadow_light: offset: -1px -1px, blur: 3px, color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8). Applied to the top-left of raised elements as inset 0.
neumorphic_treatment.shadow_dark: offset: 2px 2px, blur: 8px, color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06). Applied to the bottom-right of raised elements.

motion_cues.pulse_elements: The LIVE badge green dot pulses with a CSS animation: scale(1) to scale(1.2) over 2s ease-in-out infinite. Agent online status dots pulse similarly. The health score ring has a subtle pulse on the filled portion.
motion_cues.shimmer_elements: The hero golden sphere implies constant shimmer — particle effects around it suggest motion. Active agent cards have a subtle border shimmer: the yellow border opacity oscillates between 0.15 and 0.30 over 3s. The Cortex orchestration progress bar has a moving gradient fill.
motion_cues.glow_elements: The hero sphere radiates a warm golden glow onto surrounding surfaces. Active/selected nav items have a micro glow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,0.06). Primary CTA buttons have a warm shadow glow on hover.
motion_cues.live_indicators: Green pulse dot for LIVE badge. Orchestration progress bars with moving fills. 'Last Run: 5 min ago' timestamps that update. Signal strength bars that feel live. The overall impression is a living, breathing intelligence instrument — not a static dashboard.

layout_grid.content_area: calc(100vw - 240px), max-width: 1400px, centered with auto margins
layout_grid.card_grid: CSS Grid or Flexbox. KPI cards: 4-column grid with 16px gap. Agent cards: 3-column grid with 20px gap. Full-width sections stack vertically with 24px gap.
layout_grid.responsive_breakpoints: Not mobile — this is a desktop SaaS. But content reflows at 1280px (3-col KPI), 1024px (2-col KPI), sidebar collapses to 64px.

map_component.style: Light base map with warm cream tones matching the app palette. NOT dark map. Overlays in #FFD700 gold for data regions. Map container: border-radius: 12px, overflow: hidden, border: 1px solid #E5E5E0.
map_component.controls: Minimal zoom +/- buttons in top-right, styled as app buttons (white bg, subtle border).
